name: Peter Paul Mounds Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the shortening and 2 cups of sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift the self-rising flour into a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the sifted flour and milk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Divide the batter evenly among three greased and floured cake pans.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. For the filling: In a saucepan, combine sugar and milk over medium heat. Bring to a boil and stir in coconut flakes and marshmallows. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
9. Stir in vanilla extract.
10. Spread the hot filling between cake layers while still warm. Allow to cool completely.
11. For the icing: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir until thickened and forms a soft ball when a small amount is dropped into cold water.
12. Cool the icing slightly, then frost the top and sides of the cooled cake.
